message:
fix(export): XSS prevention, JSON encoding, and preview validation

Addresses security and robustness issues in the export package:

## XSS Prevention in Graph HTML

Updates generateUltimateHTML() to properly escape user-controlled strings
before embedding them in the HTML template:
- Title, data hash, and project name are escaped via html.EscapeString()
- Prevents potential XSS attacks when rendering graphs with malicious titles

## Preview Server JSON Encoding

Refactors statusHandler() to use proper JSON encoding:
- Replaces fmt.Fprintf with json.NewEncoder for RFC-compliant JSON output
- Adds strings.ToValidUTF8() for bundle path to handle non-UTF8 paths
- Introduces typed statusResponse struct for better maintainability

## Preview Server Validation

Enhances StartPreviewWithConfig() with improved validation:
- Checks for empty bundle path before filesystem operations
- Verifies index.html exists in bundle (matches PreviewServer.Start behavior)
- Reorders validation to fail fast before port auto-selection

## Test Coverage

Adds tests for:
- Beautiful graph rendering with special characters
- SVG snapshot generation
- Preview server configuration edge cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch: @@ -0,0 +1,33 @@ +package export + +import ( + "fmt" + "html" + "strings" + "testing" +) + +func TestGenerateUltimateHTML_EscapesTitleAndProject(t *testing.T) { + title := `bad "x"` + project := `proj & more <name>` + hash := `hash<bad&` + + out := generateUltimateHTML(title, hash, `{}`, 1, 1, project, "", "") + + safeTitle := html.EscapeString(title) + safeProject := html.EscapeString(project) + safeHash := html.EscapeString(hash) + + if !strings.Contains(out, fmt.Sprintf("<title>%s | bv Graph", safeTitle)) { + t.Fatalf("expected escaped title in tag") + } + if !strings.Contains(out, fmt.Sprintf("<h1><span>%s</span> Graph</h1>", safeTitle)) { + t.Fatalf("expected escaped title in header") + } + if !strings.Contains(out, fmt.Sprintf("Hash: %s", safeHash)) { + t.Fatalf("expected escaped hash in footer") + } + if !strings.Contains(out, fmt.Sprintf("Project: %s", safeProject)) { + t.Fatalf("expected escaped project name in footer") + } +}
